description_long: This object is a detailed model of an AK-style assault rifle, featuring a wooden fixed stock and handguard, a black metal receiver, and a long barrel. The rifle is shown with a detachable curved box magazine, several loose cartridges, and a mounted red dot sight for improved aiming. The receiver and barrel assembly are rendered in dark metal, while the stock and grip are a reddish-brown wood, giving a classic appearance. The rifle is depicted both assembled and partially disassembled, with visible internal components such as the bolt carrier and gas tube. The magazine is curved and metallic, and the rifle includes a flash hider at the muzzle. The overall design is robust, with a mix of wood and metal textures, and the object is surrounded by ammunition and spare magazines.
description: A realistic AK-style rifle with a wooden stock, black metal receiver, curved magazine, and red dot sight, shown with loose cartridges and spare magazines. The model features both assembled and disassembled views, highlighting its detailed construction.
description_view_0: Front quarter view showing the rifle partially disassembled, with the bolt carrier, magazine, and several cartridges separated and visible.
description_view_1: Side view of the fully assembled rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, curved magazine, and mounted red dot sight.
description_view_2: Direct front view with the rifle disassembled, focusing on the barrel, sight, and internal components.
description_view_3: Rear quarter view showing both the assembled rifle and disassembled parts, with a clear look at the wooden stock and spare magazines.
